TypeSignature.Value: .class public sequential ansi sealed beforefieldinit SKFourByteTag extends System.ValueType implements class System.IEquatable`1<valuetype SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag>

Docs.summary: Represents a four-byte tag used to identify font features, variation axes, and other OpenType resources.

Docs.param: The string to parse. If or empty, the returned tag has a value of zero. Strings shorter than four characters are padded with spaces.
